details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. All rubric requirements met: (1) StatsArgs variant and struct with human bool flag added to CacheCommand enum; (2) cache_stats function iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage for disk calculations; (3) pub(crate) fn cache_stats properly returns ExitStatus::Success; (4) --human flag configured with human_readable_bytes for formatting; (5) output includes per-bucket lines and total line; (6) module properly registered in mod.rs with correct use statement; (7) dispatch wiring correctly matches CacheCommand::Stats in lib.rs; (8) implementation follows same patterns as cache_size command. Additional improvements include: display_name() helper method added to CacheBucket for readable output, Python bucket included in iter() (fixing omission), test infrastructure added (cache_stats command in test context, output filters for size masking), and comprehensive test coverage for both raw and human-readable formats, empty and populated caches.
